title: Brandon Fleming
content:
People.ContactEmail bfleming@mccarthy.ca
- University of Calgary
Brandon has recently completed his JD at the University of Calgary. During law school Brandon earned a spot on the Dean's List all three years and was recognized among his peers as the graduating student who epitomizes the energy and spirit of the UCalgary Law community. Prior to beginning his legal studies, Brandon graduated as the top student in operations management at the University of Calgary where he obtained his Bachelor of Commerce with distinction. Brandon worked throughout his education in a variety of roles while also running his own business in the real estate industry. His passion for business led him to the corporate side of law.
Throughout law school, Brandon also volunteered for Pro Bono Students Canada with the Elementary School Mock Trial Project and then by developing a new project called the Youth Criminal Justice Trial Project which runs workshops for youth on the trial processes. Brandon was recognized for his dedication to PBSC and the community as the 2025 recipient of the Chief Justice Richard Wagner Award.
Outside of school and work Brandon enjoys hockey, golf, and spending time with his gargantuan family of eight siblings.
